'''Kelsa Vilrein''' was the hostess and ticket taker aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]. She was a dark haired [[Gender/Legends|woman]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}}
